<!-- Thanks for contributing to Zoijs! Keep PRs small and focused. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description. Link the issue/RFC it addresses. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (no API change)
- [ ] Performance / internal refactor (no API change)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] API change / addition (requires an approved RFC — link it)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:types` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:browser` passes (if behavior touches the DOM/parser/events)
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated docs in `docs/` and the Unreleased section of `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies; no build step introduced
- [ ] Change fits Zoijs's scope (small core, no JSX/VDOM/router/SSR in core)
